name: Star-Lord
description: Peter Jason Quill, half-human and half-Celestial, was abducted from Earth as a child by the Ravagers led by Yondu Udonta. Growing up among thieves and outlaws, he fashioned himself as Star-Lord, a self-proclaimed legendary outlaw who assembled the Guardians of the Galaxy. Armed with quad-blasters, jet boots, and a retractable helmet, Quill's greatest weapons are his charm, his mixtape, and his capacity for love. He held an Infinity Stone bare-handed and danced to distract a god.
